mapper.sql: select i.id, i.enterprise_id, e.enterprise_name, i.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, i.location_id, l.location_name, i.product_id, p.product_name, i.qty_piece, i.locked_qty_piece, i.avail_qty_piece, i.status, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.remark from ims_inventory i left join ims_enterprise e on i.enterprise_id = e.id left join ims_warehouse w on i.warehouse_id = w.id left join ims_warehouse_location l on i.location_id = l.id left join ims_product p on i.product_id = p.id
mapper.update: update ims_inventory set qty_piece = qty_piece + #{changeQty}, avail_qty_piece = avail_qty_piece + #{changeQty}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into ims_inventory
enterprise_id, warehouse_id, location_id, product_id, qty_piece, locked_qty_piece, avail_qty_piece, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{enterpriseId}, #{warehouseId}, #{locationId}, #{productId}, #{qtyPiece}, #{lockedQtyPiece}, #{availQtyPiece}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from ims_inventory where id in
#{id}
